reviews.review_title: The discord mods are all racist losers
reviews.review_description:
I had a really negative experience with the game’s Discord moderation, and it ultimately ruined the game for me.
I was banned from the Discord and from playing the game after a disagreement with a player. Shortly after, I received direct messages from the same person who is also staff that included harassment and extremely inappropriate and racist language telling me to kill myself and calling me a little n***** yet I got banned for racism because I called him a furry? I reported this behavior by rejoining on another account to share evidence, but instead of it being addressed, my messages were removed and I was banned again.
From my experience, there seems to be a lack of accountability within the moderation team. Reports of staff misconduct were not taken seriously, and attempts to bring attention to it were shut down rather than investigated.
A healthy community depends on fair and transparent moderation. Unfortunately, that wasn’t my experience here. If the developers want the game to grow, addressing how their Discord is managed would be a good place to start. It's just a gang of furry minors that control the discord and game moderation so if you make one mad they all come after you and if you try to expose one they silence you.. They ruined what used to be a good game that's just what happens when you let a bunch of minor weirdos have a little bit of power now the game is practically dead and all the best players left for the same reasons.

A person called your loss is inevitable said to me "go kill yourself you serve zero you suck and remember to kill yourself" unfortunately I have been struggling with my mental health and this makes it worse 

Also he's a pedo how do these players get to play the game

developer_response.body: Hello, sorry to hear about your unpleasant experience. Please submit any clip of the violation via Discord or report the player directly in-game for review. Thank you for your understanding.

reviews.review_description: when i first started i had some doubt but me and this game had a connection this game, war of wizards is good but there are some Con's like people are toxic and threat to report you but otherwise this.  game is very worth it especially if you got horizian plus i recommend this game, war of wizards.

not his fault and he made the kid want to drink poison and laghed about it and cused
and his name is DUDE.                   but I is like this game

I reported a player for cheating...specifically using out-of-bounds exploits along with Blood Linked, Last Stand, Nightmare, and Abyssal Quartet. After linking Blood Linked to me, he went out of bounds, which caused me to die as well. He was clearly taking unfair advantage of the situation to boost his wins, though I still managed to beat him.

I submitted a report with video evidence, but the developers found no fault in his behavior. Are they serious? Are they that kind of delusional?

At this point, it seems like players can cheat and the developers just don’t care.

developer_response.body:
Hi DeafyPro! Thank you for your feedback. We have implemented restrictions and measures against boundary abuse, and those involved will face additional penalties. After reviewing your report, we believe the situation adheres to the normal use of the spells and does not constitute cheating or abuse.

We warmly encourage you to share any suggestions regarding spell balance in the balance channel on Discord. All feedback will be recorded and regularly reviewed by the developers. Thank you for your understanding and support as we continue to strive for an improved gaming experience!

reviews.review_title: 10 out of 10 five out of five stars

This game has been kept up for years and that speaks for itself. I will say it’s odd how few “summon” spells there are in a game about board control, and playing against their bots is truly just not enjoyable at all on account of the fact that they have seemingly infinite mana and spam you with basic attacks the entire time.

developer_response.body: Hey! We're really glad that you enjoy our game. Regarding the two points you raised — we'll take a closer look, and will work on optimizing the gameplay experience based on your suggestions. Feel free to join our Discord community, where you can report issues and share suggestions with us in a timely manner.

reviews.review_title: Best game i have on VR
reviews.review_description:
If you can afford this and you want a new game get this 

I love the fighting and how it takes strategy and combines it with simplicity to make the spells and how you use them can let you win or lose

The matchmaking isn’t always great but if you do good you can always still win

I personally think that the creativity they put into the game to make the spells and designs is amazing

If you get this game and you practice it you can get really good and a lot of good spells to win the games more easily

I would not recommend using real life money because I have seen people get mad because they spent money than what they got was nerfed

This game is amazing and it has a good community when it comes to an overall there will sometimes be mean people

If you get this you will most likely be able to agree with everything that I have stated about the game

You also get to draw all of the spells to cast them which in my opinion is an added bonus to the game because it ends up being fun to draw all of the spells

P.S some of the things I said will most likely change or it might not they also may be a general thing and it may differ depending on your rank your spells or even your play stile but overall it is the best game I have got on my VR
You may know me but the game was once good but now it has become a p2w game which the moderators of the game don’t care sadly and the discord doesn’t do 💩 bc they want money.￼

I love that instead of the devs putting effort into things they type a sentence or 2 into chat gpt then make a low effort 3d model of said AI Slop and sell it to make money off of you. 
I used to love this game but it shows how much the changes hurt what I used to love about the game. The game was what looked like it was ran by passionate people but now it's low effort.

developer_response.body:
Hi, thanks for sharing your thoughts.
We'd like to clarify that all our 3D models are created by our team — we do not use AI-generated assets. If there's a specific model or change you feel doesn't meet expectations, we'd genuinely appreciate more details so we can look into it.
We're a small team and put real effort into this game. Feedback is always welcome, but we hope it can be based on specifics rather than assumptions.
Thanks for playing.

reviews.review_description: The game looks ai and it is p2w with everytims you join a match you get paired up with sweats who don’t touch grass or get off the game.

developer_response.body: Hey, Thank you for your feedback! We hear your concerns about matchmaking and progression. Just to clarify — we don't design the game around P2W. Each spell has its own unique function, and with skillful gameplay, any spell can be effective in its own way. We encourage players to explore different strategies and techniques to find their unique playstyle. We also run regular free events where you can try out a variety of skills and discover new ways to play. Appreciate you sharing your thoughts!

reviews.review_description: This game is lowkey just fun af get rn just try it you MIGHT like it and if you dont have money get apperentice addishon its free

game is 20 dollars and while some of the f2p aspects we're getting progressively annoying I think they have gone too far with their most recent update the passes are fine after all it is optional but they added a weekly gold cap I was getting on to grind more gold only to find this cap completely ruins the experience in my opinion especially for newer players otherwise great game

developer_response.body:
Just wanted to clear the air! The 20,000 cap was actually put in place to stop **gold-farming bots** we've been seeing lately.

To put it in perspective: you'd need to play **more than 70 matches a week** to hit it. If you're actually playing 100+ matches a week and hitting that limit, we'd probably tell you to go touch some grass for a bit (just kidding, we love the dedication!) :wink:.

**Bottom line:**

1. It **only** affects gold from battle results, not quests or actual gameplay.
2. If we see too many real players hitting the ceiling, we’ll bump it up to **30,000** ASAP.

We're keeping an eye on the data to make sure it only catches the bots, not the legends! :v:

reviews.review_title: Every player is at most 5 yo
reviews.review_description:
OK, I used to love this game. I used to play it so much and I would absolutely give this five stars. If every lobby I went into didn’t have children screaming my ear off please put an age restriction or something on your game. I went into a lobby once and a squeaker said the N-word at me hard R 

And not to mention the AI slop 
Dude, almost all of your images. Now that you used to promote the game are AI please just put more effort into putting an age rating on your game after I got off one of my games, my ear was literally ringing ￼

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback! We actually have a strict 13+ age requirement to download the game, however we unfortunately have no control over parents allowing their children to use their devices.
Regarding toxic behavior, we have integrated Toxmod, a professional profanity detection system, and the game also includes a report feature — reporting a player will deduct their reputation score, and those with a low enough score will be muted or banned from playing.
As for the AI art, we won't deny that some images were assisted by AI. However, as a small team, we focus most of our energy on developing new abilities and balancing gameplay. We've recently launched a brand new game mode and we hope you, as a long-time player, will enjoy it.
We truly appreciate your feedback and will keep working hard to improve. Hope to see you in game!

reviews.review_description: Don't get me wrong the game is fun in its own aspects 110% my only problem is whenever I actually go to get my free spell at the end of the week that it tells me I get for the last 3 weeks straight it just doesn't give it to me and I've been on on the same date that it says I've even been on at midnight whenever it hits but it just won't give me my free spell

In my opinion, genuinely one of the better games really underrated in my opinion, slowly getting more and more players and updates every so often


Spells: I really like different spells that you can unlock using coins/gems yes it can be paid to win sometimes, but still if you use other people’s referral codes and ask people to use your referral code and just overall grind events and games you can easily get coins to unlock the spells

Community: the community is OK still pretty toxic at times but still really fun, I’ve recently joined the discord server after getting banned  (ps I sowy) ￼ but yeah, the community has been pretty nice. I mean, unless you make a horrible suggestion then you’re probably getting flamed, but still really good community overall

Bug abusers/exploiters if I had to say something bad about this game, it would be the fact that the community is toxic, but still, I already said that, but it would also be that it’s pretty easy to cheat/abuse bugs I used to be one of them (I sowy again)

Cosmetic stuff: I like the cosmetic wands and skins that you can get with funny references sometimes but we mainly need more things like scenes/backgrounds for people’s style

￼ breaks: I took a break for around a year and I feel like I barely lost any progress maybe like two or three spells that got dropped while I was gone again. This might genuinely be a bad thing because the games updates are slow, but still easy for somebody to catch up on if they took a break for a while
K

Bewitch spell
￼
Good game
Irrivesable curse, steal mulple minions at once, powerful

developer_response.body: Hello, Thank you for your feedback. We're truly sorry to hear that you're not satisfied with your experience in the game. We're always working hard to improve. If there are any features or changes you'd like to suggest, please feel free to reach out to us on Discord: http://discord.gg/wowvr or email us at warofwizardsvr@gmail.com. We'll do our best to make the game better. Thank you for your support.

I tried for 20 minutes to cast the first spell of the game i tried small I tried big I took 5 minutes drawing the perfect circles and flags game wouldn't tell what was wrong i dont know how much longer I need to try i took a break tried for another 30 MINUTES and got the same result unistalled and reinstalled it still cant do anything doggy game I got free with horizon plus but regret wasting the download space played for 1 hour and couldn't cast a single spell

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your feedback! We're sorry to hear you're having trouble casting the first spell. This can sometimes happen due to network delays—when the connection is unstable, the rating display (A/B/C/D) may lag or fail to appear, which can prevent the spell from being recognized.

We recommend that after drawing the spell, you wait a moment until the ratings show up on both sides before releasing. This should help ensure the spell is registered properly. Hope this helps, and feel free to reach out if the issue continues!

reviews.review_description: Just good
Bro they say It’s NoT aI ST op mAkiNg assumptions the guy on the cover has 6 fingers right now and the spells are ai

developer_response.body: Hey DonovanD, thanks for the feedback! While we do use AI tools to assist in parts of our development process, we want to clarify that our cover art goes through thorough quality checks before release. A basic error like six fingers on the cover is simply not something that would make it past our review process — that claim is a bit of a stretch. We take pride in the quality of our work and wouldn't let something like that slip through. If you have any genuine concerns about the game, we're always happy to hear them!

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback! We understand that everyone wants to unlock their favorite skills quickly. Each spell has its own unique function, and there's no hierarchy among them. Even the spells that new players receive can be highly effective with skillful gameplay. We encourage players to explore different strategies and techniques to find their unique playstyle. We also run regular free events where you can try out a variety of skills and discover new ways to play. Hope you continue to enjoy the game!

reviews.review_description: this game is the best when it comes to getting your rage out physically definitely not mentally because you don’t want to say well bad things, but I read it five stars there are so many magical spells, and so many skins and wands, although you might want to add a reporting system, because lots and lots of people swear and cheat but overall I rate it a five stars.

reviews.review_title: Could be a 4/5 star if the devs update
reviews.review_description:
There are a few minor bugs, like the slight lag when dodging attacks, but nothing major.
What really ruins it is this cheesy strategy where players somehow lower their own HP to around 30%,  then abuse Last Stand to spam Abyssal Quartete and Nightmare. It’s such a lame tactic. I don’t even understand how they’re dropping their own health that low in the first place — none of the spells seem to allow self-damage like that. For example a player named Ganjalf ITA

developer_response.body: Hey SecoBlack, Thanks for your review! We've taken note of the skill combination you mentioned and will submit it to our team for balance evaluation. Thanks for your support!

reviews.review_description: The game is good and all but every time I rank up to grand sage 5 all I get are 2 legendary wizard 5s and they just spam wind the whole match and I also just want to get some people my rank also don't think that an apprentice mage 1 should have the eclipse wand and also I quit 1v1s because I went afk for 1 match because I had to do something and lost 500 rank points went down 5 ranks all I am asking is for the match making to be a little more fare and for the points system to be more fare

developer_response.body: Hi, thank you for your feedback. We take the points deduction and matchmaking issues you mentioned seriously. To investigate this more efficiently, please join our official Discord in the game and provide the specific match time and details. We'll prioritize looking into it once we receive your information. Thank you for your patience and support.

reviews.review_title: GGreat game, but I have some suggestions
reviews.review_description:
I believe that the system of ￼this game is overall quite unique and amazing but certain things require… Polishing ￼
Don’t get me wrong. The idea of the game is awesome and most of the execution is good but some things look a little AI generated and less worked on. However, you take your time you should be able to control your own game and I can’t complain too much as this game may or may not be in an alpha stage ￼￼ overall the general mechanics and work put into how the system works is treasure to me, and I believe that this game has a lot of potential also I think you should be able to join the off-line world easily because I don’t like it when I’m trying to join the lobby and people keep shooting me in the online world 
￼￼￼

This game is top tier, not only is the magic/combat system very unique and fun, but the players are also mostly quite polite and relaxed. Overall, this is a great game for both veteran and new VR players.

Great game but how on earth do you get gems in the online lobby???? Thanks for the reply but I've tried numerous times to shoot the targets but I can't for the life of me work out how to shoot from the staff!?!! Please help!!

developer_response.body: Attack the runes in the sky or slay other ghosts.
